initiatives.name: The Black Response Cambridge
initiatives.description: A grassroots organization fostering mutual aid and community solidarity through Black-led organizing in Cambridge. They coordinate direct support initiatives, political education, and solidarity networks while building power through community organizing and creating spaces for collective liberation and racial justice.

initiatives.name: Cambridge DSA
initiatives.description: Organizing for housing for all, a citywide green new deal, defunding the police & a socialist future.

initiatives.name: Cambridge Community Fridge
initiatives.description: Pantry currently hosted at Elizabeth Peabody House, Somerville

initiatives.name: Material Aid and Advocacy Program (MAAP)
initiatives.description: Community care (drop-in, material aid, sweep support) & organizing w/ unhoused people & people who use drugs for transformative change in thes/Camb area
